blocked_language: scientifically proven to affect the human psyche

purpose: Evidence-readiness scorecards for production decisions that may support listener appeal hypotheses without claiming proof.

dimensions.label: Tempo, pulse, and motor-lock potential
dimensions.measurement_prompt: After staging, rate whether the pulse invites head-nod/body-lock within the first 30 seconds without masking the banjo lead.
production_evidence: Tempo is 96 BPM.
Deep-house pulse or kick language is present.

dimensions.label: Recognizable hook recurrence
dimensions.measurement_prompt: Mark the first timestamp where the core motif is recognized, then note whether it returns with meaningful variation.
production_evidence: Arrangement has 6 generated scenes.
Hook, roll, or refrain language appears in the track brief.

dimensions.label: Human call-response contour
dimensions.measurement_prompt: During a rough playback, log whether response phrases feel conversational rather than stacked or ornamental.
production_evidence: Call-response routing or answer phrases are declared.
Banjo/fiddle language supports human conversational contour.

dimensions.label: Contrast between acoustic core and alien electronics
dimensions.measurement_prompt: Compare acoustic-core audibility against alien texture density; note any section where identity collapses into generic wash.
production_evidence: Traditional layer count: 6.
Alien/electronic layer count: 5.

dimensions.label: Width, azimuth, depth, and freeze movement
dimensions.measurement_prompt: On headphones and speakers, rate whether spatial movement supports form without pulling the lead instrument out of focus.
production_evidence: Spatial harmonic field or spatial send targets are present.
Brief references width, dub, fade, bloom, or spatial movement.

dimensions.label: Breaks, stops, fills, and expectation resets
dimensions.measurement_prompt: Log whether a break, stop, or fill changes attention without feeling like a random edit.
production_evidence: Break, stop, fill, or anti-polish language is present.
Punk constraint language appears in the source brief.

dimensions.label: Audible live-controller and one-take risk
dimensions.measurement_prompt: During controller rehearsal, note whether imperfections read as human urgency rather than technical failure.
production_evidence: AeroBand/controller/live-risk language is present.
Humanization or velocity articulation targets are available.

dimensions.label: Historically grounded source-deck resonance
dimensions.measurement_prompt: Before any unmute, verify whether source use has audible purpose, credit clarity, and rights evidence.
production_evidence: Approved source candidate count: 3.
Source deck state: muted_until_human_provenance_review.

minimum_evidence_before_strong_claim: defined listener sample and inclusion criteria
pre/post listening measures or repeated-rating instrument
